description: Read pull request data: metadata, diff, combined status, files, review comments, reviews, issue comments, or check runs.

method.description: get: PR JSON; get_diff: raw diff; get_status: combined status for head commit; get_files: changed files; get_review_comments: inline review comments; get_reviews: submitted reviews; get_comments: issue-style comments on the PR; get_check_runs: check runs for head commit.
